title: Anthropic becomes first AI startup to join the Frontier carbon removal coalition
summary: Anthropic joined the Frontier coalition, which received $915M in pledges for carbon removal projects. This marks a significant commitment by a major AI startup to environmental sustainability initiatives.
content: Anthropic has joined the Frontier coalition, which received another $915M in pledges to fund carbon removal projects.

zh.title: Anthropic成为首家加入Frontier碳移除联盟的AI初创公司
zh.summary: Anthropic加入了Frontier联盟，该联盟获得了9.15亿美元的碳移除项目承诺。这标志着一家主要AI初创公司对环保可持续发展倡议的重大承诺。

title: Anthropic got hit by export rules nobody understands
summary: The Trump administration blocked Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models for foreign nationals and employees, citing national security export controls. This is reportedly the first time US export controls have been used to restrict AI model access in this manner.
content:
Anthropic has spent much of this week fighting to get its newest AI models back online after the Trump administration abruptly ordered the company to cut access for all foreign nationals, including users inside the US and its own employees, forcing Anthropic to block access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 for everyone. 

"To my knowledge, this is the first time US export controls have been used to control access to an AI model in this way."

The Trump administration has not publicly explained the legal basis for the order, but in a statement on its website, Anthropic said the government cited "national security authorities" to justify "an export con …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Anthropic遭遇无人理解的出口管制
zh.summary: 特朗普政府以国家安全出口管制为由，禁止外国国民和员工访问Anthropic的Fable 5和Mythos 5模型。据报道，这是美国首次使用出口管制来限制AI模型访问。

title: The Slate Truck's price may have leaked, starts at $24,950
summary: The Slate Truck's starting price has allegedly leaked at $24,950, with an official launch scheduled for next week.
content: The official launch takes place next week.

zh.title: Slate卡车价格可能泄露，起价24,950美元
zh.summary: Slate卡车的起价据称泄露为24,950美元，官方发布定于下周进行。

title: Cybercriminals allegedly hacked tens of thousands of Fortinet firewalls used by major companies all over the world
summary: Russian-speaking cybercriminals have reportedly compromised tens of thousands of Fortinet firewalls used by major companies worldwide using known passwords. The breach affects organizations across multiple industries relying on Fortinet security infrastructure.
content: An alleged Russian-speaking group of cybercriminals is reportedly compromising and targeting several major companies that use Fortinet Firewalls and VPNs through previously known passwords.

zh.title: 网络犯罪分子涉嫌入侵全球大型公司使用的数万台Fortinet防火墙
zh.summary: 据报道，讲俄语的网络犯罪分子使用已知密码入侵了全球大型公司使用的数万台Fortinet防火墙。这一漏洞影响了依赖Fortinet安全基础设施的多个行业的组织。

title: Social media’s next evolution: User-controlled algorithms
summary: Major social media platforms including Threads, Instagram, and TikTok are introducing customizable algorithm tools that let users directly influence their recommendation feeds. This shift represents a move toward more transparent and user-empowered content discovery.
content: Social media feeds are becoming more customizable as platforms like Threads, Instagram, and TikTok introduce tools that let users directly influence the algorithms powering their recommendations.

zh.title: 社交媒体的下一步演进：用户可控的算法
zh.summary: 包括Threads、Instagram和TikTok在内的主要社交媒体平台正在推出可自定义的算法工具，让用户直接影响其推荐源。这一转变代表着向更透明和用户赋权的内容发现的转变。

title: "Dangerous" AI models are coming no matter what
summary: Advanced AI models with hacking capabilities will soon become commonplace regardless of current restrictions.
content: AI models with advanced hacking capabilities will soon be the norm.

zh.title: 无论如何，"危险"的人工智能模型都会到来
zh.summary: 具有黑客能力的先进人工智能模型将很快变得普遍，无论目前的限制如何。

title: World model maker Odyssey nabs $1.45B valuation backed by Amazon and other big names
summary: World model startup Odyssey raised funding at a $1.45B valuation backed by Amazon and other major investors. World models are emerging as the next major frontier in AI development beyond large language models.
content: World models are the next big thing in AI beyond LLMs and, with this round, Odyssey has cemented itself as one of the startups to watch.

zh.title: 世界模型初创公司Odyssey获得亚马逊等支持下的14.5亿美元估值
zh.summary: 世界模型初创公司Odyssey以14.5亿美元估值融资，由亚马逊和其他主要投资者支持。世界模型正成为超越大型语言模型的人工智能开发的下一个主要前沿。

title: Mastodon looks to newsletters to help revive the open social web
summary: Mastodon launched a newsletter feature allowing creators to reach subscribers via email without requiring a Mastodon account. The feature aims to revitalize the open social web and expand Mastodon's reach.
content: Mastodon’s newly launched newsletter feature lets anyone subscribe to creators by email, even without a Mastodon account.

zh.title: Mastodon推出通讯功能帮助振兴开放社交网络
zh.summary: Mastodon推出了通讯功能，允许创作者通过电子邮件与订阅者联系，无需Mastodon账户。该功能旨在振兴开放社交网络并扩大Mastodon的覆盖范围。

title: Two-thirds of Americans think AI is advancing too quickly
summary: A Pew Research poll shows 63 percent of Americans believe AI is advancing too quickly, though 49 percent use chatbots occasionally. ChatGPT usage has doubled since 2023, yet only 16 percent think AI will have a positive societal impact.
content:
According to the latest Pew Research poll, 49 percent of Americans report using chatbots at least occasionally, but 63 percent think the tech is advancing too quickly. Overall, use of AI chatbots has increased dramatically since 2024, when only 33 percent reported using them. Specifically, ChatGPT's usage has doubled since 2023, with 44 percent of respondents saying they've used it. But opinions remain negative, with only 16 percent saying that AI will have a positive impact on society.
Interestingly, it's the younger generations who both report using AI more and who are inclined to have a more pessimistic view. 66 percent of Americans betw …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 三分之二的美国人认为人工智能发展速度过快
zh.summary: 皮尤研究中心的民意调查显示，63%的美国人认为人工智能发展速度过快，尽管49%的人偶尔使用聊天机器人。自2023年以来，ChatGPT的使用量翻了一番，但只有16%的人认为人工智能将对社会产生积极影响。

title: Only 16 percent of Americans think AI will have a positive impact on society, a new study shows
summary: A Pew Research study reveals only 16 percent of Americans believe AI will positively impact society, contrasting sharply with Wall Street's enthusiasm. The data highlights a growing disconnect between investor optimism and public sentiment on AI development.
content: Although Wall Street loves AI, every day Americans are significantly less optimistic about the industry, a new report from Pew Research shows.

zh.title: 仅16%的美国人认为AI将对社会产生积极影响，一项新研究显示
zh.summary: 皮尤研究中心的一项研究表明，仅16%的美国人认为AI将对社会产生积极影响，与华尔街的乐观态度形成鲜明对比。这些数据突出了投资者乐观情绪与公众对AI发展看法之间日益增长的脱节。

title: Two Stanford grads raise $11M to build a noninvasive wearable for hormone tracking
summary: Clair Health, founded by Stanford graduates, raised $11M to develop a noninvasive wearable that tracks hormonal markers, inflammation, and cycle phase information. The device aims to provide insights into cycle irregularities and perimenopause.
content: Clair Health will track inflammation and bloating markers, energy levels, and cycle phase classification to give insights into cycle irregularities and perimenopause, as well as hormonal fluctuations, and how to navigate those changes.

zh.title: 两位斯坦福毕业生筹集1100万美元开发非侵入式激素追踪可穿戴设备
zh.summary: Clair Health是由斯坦福毕业生创办的公司，筹集了1100万美元用于开发一款非侵入式可穿戴设备，可以追踪激素标志物、炎症和周期阶段信息。该设备旨在提供关于周期不规律和更年期的见解。

title: The Echo Dot Max is cheaper than ever in an early Prime Day sale
summary: The Amazon Echo Dot Max smart speaker is on sale for $64.99 ($35 off) in early Prime Day deals. The device features advanced audio quality, faster response times, and support for multiple smart home protocols and Alexa Plus.
content:
The Echo Dot Max comes in a variety of fun colors, including purple. | Photo by Jennifer Pattison Tuohy / The Verge	

We’re seeing good early Prime Day deals ahead of the event next week, and unsurprisingly, some of the best deals are on Amazon’s own devices. Several Echo speakers have dropped to new low prices, including the Echo Dot Max, which is on sale for $64.99 ($35 off) at Amazon.
Echo Dot Max

Where to Buy:

 $99.99 $64.99 at Amazon
 $99.99 at Best Buy
 $99.99 at Target

Our smart home reviewer Jennifer Pattison Tuohy named the Echo Max her top pick among Alexa speakers, calling it “Amazon’s best all-around smart speaker.” The elegant, fabric-wrapped speaker delivers plenty of bass, and comes with its own dedicated tweeter and woofer that provide crisper sound than its predecessor. It’s also faster and more responsive, with Amazon’s AZ3 Neural Edge processor helping it hear voice commands more accurately, even if you’re speaking from across the room or over background noise.
The Echo Max also doubles as a capable smart home hub with support for Zigbee, Matter, and Thread, allowing you to connect and control a wide range of compatible smart home devices from brands beyond Amazon. It also supports Alexa Plus, Amazon’s more context-aware AI-powered voice assistant, which can handle multiple requests at once. That means you can do things like dim the lights and lock the doors without having to issue separate commands. In our reviewer’s testing, Alexa was even able to turn off the hallway lights, adjust the upstairs thermostat, and start a robot vacuum in the kitchen all at once.
Read our Echo Dot Max review.

zh.title: Echo Dot Max在早期Prime Day促销中的价格创历史新低
zh.summary: 亚马逊Echo Dot Max智能音箱在早期Prime Day促销中的售价为64.99美元（优惠35美元）。该设备具有先进的音频质量、更快的响应时间，并支持多种智能家居协议和Alexa Plus。

title: Google bets on Gemini to reinvent the smart home speaker
summary: Google unveiled its new $99.99 Google Home Speaker, which replaces rigid voice commands with more conversational Gemini AI interactions. The move demonstrates Google's strategy to leverage generative AI to revitalize the smart speaker market.
content: Google is betting generative AI can breathe new life into the smart speaker. The company's new $99.99 Google Home Speaker replaces the rigid commands of the Google Assistant era with more conversational Gemini interactions.

zh.title: 谷歌押注Gemini重塑智能音箱
zh.summary: 谷歌推出新款售价99.99美元的Google Home智能音箱，用更自然对话式的Gemini AI交互取代生硬的语音命令。这一举措展示了谷歌利用生成式AI振兴智能音箱市场的战略。

title: Vibe-decoding the White House-Anthropic fight over Fable
summary: Coverage explores tensions between the Trump administration and Anthropic over export controls affecting Fable 5 model access. The article provides political context around regulatory actions targeting frontier AI development.
content:
CEO of Anthropic Dario Amodei attends a working lunch with G7 leaders, G7 outreach partners, and global tech CEOs on innovation and AI, during the G7 Summit on June 17th, 2026, in Evian-les-Bains, France. | Photo: Anna Moneymaker / Getty Images	

Hello and welcome to Regulator, an email for Verge subscribers about technology, politics, and what happens when science crashes headlong into self-interest. Not a subscriber? Sign up here today! Got the scoop on a petty feud that's going to somehow fundamentally reshape the entire field of frontier AI development? Send 'em over to tina.nguyen+tips@theverge.com.
Back when I was covering Donald Trump's first presidency, it was incredibly common to read three different versions of the same story. His administration had split into several factions, all of which had different interests, and all of which hated each other. There was the Reince Pr …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 解读白宫与Anthropic围绕Fable的争执
zh.summary: 报道探讨了特朗普政府与Anthropic之间关于影响Fable 5模型访问的出口管制的紧张局势。文章提供了针对前沿AI开发的监管行动的政治背景。

title: Can anyone look cool wearing Snap’s $2,000 glasses?
summary: Snap debuted its new $2,195 Specs glasses after 12+ years of development, positioned as a device to replace phone screens with more human-centered computing. The high price and bold design pose challenges for mainstream consumer adoption.
content:
Snap CEO Evan Spiegel wearing the Snap Specs. They’re not the worst on him, but bold fashion rarely makes for mainstream success. | Screenshot: CNBC	

Yesterday, Snap debuted its new $2,195 Specs glasses. In an interview with CNBC, Snap CEO Evan Spiegel described the Specs as something the company had been working on for more than 12 years, an attempt to "bring computing into the world" and "make it more human." He positioned them as a device to help people stay more connected to the world around them instead of looking down at their phones. People, he said, are tired of screens. 
While Spiegel was speaking, I was struck by how, whenever his head moved, the light caught the lenses just so, revealing the hidden outline of the Specs' display. It was ironic that Spiegel was talking about scr …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 穿Snap的2000美元眼镜能显得很酷吗？
zh.summary: Snap在12多年的开发后推出了新款2195美元的Specs眼镜，定位为替代手机屏幕、实现以人为中心计算的设备。高昂的价格和大胆的设计对主流消费者采纳构成了挑战。

title: The best Apple deals you can already get ahead of Prime Day
summary: Amazon Prime Day starts June 23rd with early Apple deals already available from retailers like Amazon, Walmart, and Best Buy. Notable discounts include AirPods Pro 3 dropping to $169-$179.99 and Apple Watch Series 11 at competitive prices, with steeper discounts likely during Prime Day itself.
content:
The latest AirPods Pro are currently almost as cheap as the AirPods 4 with noise-canceling. | Photo by Amelia Holowaty Krales / The Verge	

Amazon’s Prime Day sale kicks off on June 23rd, but already we’re seeing some notable Apple deals trickle in. Whether you’re looking for a new pair of wireless earbuds or a smartwatch, many retailers are offering notable discounts ahead of the shopping event. Walmart and Amazon recently surprised us with a new all-time low on the AirPods Pro 3, bringing the earbuds down to $169, though the deal has been volatile, going in and out of stock. Meanwhile, the Apple Watch Series 11 has returned to one of its best prices to date.
Of course, there’s a good chance some Apple products will see even steeper discounts once Prime Day arrives, but it’s anyone’s guess which deals will improve and by how much. For now, the below are the best Apple deals available right now. And, if you’re curious what else is already on sale ahead of the big sales event, be sure to check out our roundup of the best early Prime Day deals, which we’re keeping up to date.
We’ll also continue updating this guide as Prime Day approaches and throughout the event itself, highlighting the best Apple deals as they become available.
Earbud and headphone deals
AirPods Pro 3
The latest AirPods Pro offer improved noise cancellation and richer bass, along with built-in heart sensors that works with Apple’s Fitness app to monitor calories burned across more than 50 workouts. Read our review.

Where to Buy:

 $249 $179.99 at Amazon
 $249.99 $169 at Walmart
 $249 $179.99 at Best Buy

The AirPods 4 on sale at Amazon, Walmart, and Best Buy for $99 ($30 off). Apple’s entry-level earbuds offer richer bass than previous generations along with a more robust IP54 rating for water and dust resistance. They match the latest AirPods Pro in voice call quality and work well with other Apple devices too, though they lack more advanced features like active noise cancellation. It might be a p

zh.title: 亚马逊Prime Day前可以获得的最佳Apple交易
zh.summary: 亚马逊Prime Day将于6月23日开始，来自亚马逊、沃尔玛和百思买等零售商的早期Apple交易已经可用。值得注意的折扣包括AirPods Pro 3降至$169-$179.99，Apple Watch Series 11价格具有竞争力，Prime Day期间预计会有更大幅度的折扣。

title: Got Thread problems? There’s an app for that
summary: Thread Group launched Thread Networks Diagnostics Tools, a new iOS beta app (with Android alpha) providing the first dedicated tool for diagnosing and managing Thread-based smart home networks. The app helps users troubleshoot connectivity issues in complex Thread network setups, which use the Thread protocol underlying the Matter smart home standard.
content:
The new Thread Networks Diagnostics Tools app from Thread Group, the standards body behind the wireless IoT protocol, officially launches in beta today. The app, which arrives on iOS and has been available on Android in alpha for a few weeks, is the first dedicated tool to provide visibility into your Thread-based smart home network. I've been testing the Android version on my complicated home network and, with a bit of extra legwork, have diagnosed several issues with my Thread setup.
Thread is one of the protocols the smart home standard Matter runs on, and since Matter over Thread devices began arriving in 2023, there have been reports o …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 有Thread问题？有一个应用可以解决
zh.summary: Thread Group推出了Thread Networks诊断工具，这是一个新的iOS beta应用（配有Android alpha版本），提供了第一个专门的工具来诊断和管理基于Thread的智能家居网络。该应用帮助用户排除复杂Thread网络设置中的连接问题，这些设置使用Thread协议，是Matter智能家居标准的基础。

title: Jackery announces ‘world’s slimmest’ fridge battery
summary: Jackery introduced the FridgeGuard, a slim 2.63-inch power station designed to backup refrigerators during outages with 800W continuous output and 1kWh capacity. The compact design fits on top or beside a fridge with 10ms UPS switchover, keeping a typical fridge running for about 10 hours on battery alone.
content:
Designed to fit on top of, behind, or next to a fridge for battery backup during a power outage. | Image: Jackery	

Jackery is jumping on the fridge-battery trend with what it says is the "world's slimmest." FridgeGuard also looks nice; a break from power stations that tend to look more at home at a job site than the kitchen or living room.
Measuring just 2.63 inches (67mm) thick, the Jackery FridgeGuard power station is meant to be tucked on top of, beside, or behind your refrigerator and automatically spring to life with a 10ms UPS switchover during a power outage. Its modest 800W of AC output (1600W peak) and 1kWh LFP battery will keep the typical US fridge / freezer combo running for about 10 hours - or double that if you add a 1kWh expansion battery …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Jackery宣布"世界最薄"冰箱电池
zh.summary: Jackery推出了FridgeGuard，这是一个纤薄的2.63英寸电源站，旨在为冰箱停电期间提供备份电源，具有800W连续输出和1kWh容量。该紧凑设计可放在冰箱顶部或旁边，具有10ms UPS切换，可让典型冰箱单独在电池上运行约10小时。

title: Thread Direct looks to solve Matter’s biggest setup headache
summary: Thread is adding Thread Direct, a new feature enabling users to set up Thread devices without a dedicated border router—just using a phone with Thread radio support like recent iPhones, Pixels, or Samsung flagships. This simplifies onboarding for smart plugs, locks, and other Thread devices, addressing a major Matter setup obstacle.
content:
The smart home networking protocol Thread is adding a new way to onboard devices without a Thread border router. The feature, called Thread Direct, is designed to let users set up Thread-powered devices - such as smart plugs and smart locks - using only a phone or mobile device equipped with a Thread radio. Current devices with Thread radios include many iPhones, newer Pixel phones, and the latest Samsung flagships.
Thread is one of the networking technologies used with the smart home interoperability standard Matter. A low-powered, low-latency mesh networking protocol, Thread provides a way for devices to talk to each other locally in your …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Thread Direct 看起来要解决 Matter 最大的设置难题
zh.summary: Thread 正在添加 Thread Direct，这是一项新功能，使用户可以在没有专用边界路由器的情况下设置 Thread 设备——只需使用支持 Thread 的手机，如最近的 iPhone、Pixel 或三星旗舰机。这简化了智能插头、锁和其他 Thread 设备的入门，解决了 Matter 设置的一个主要障碍。

title: GuliKit’s new mobile Switch 2 dock lets you play with or without a TV
summary: GuliKit announced a new TV Docking Station supporting Switch 2 and earlier Switch models at $29.99, undercutting competitors like Jsaux ($46) and Genki ($69.99). The 105-gram dock features a magnetic dust cover that doubles as a stand, now available through Amazon and other GuliKit retailers.
content:
The dock is much smaller and lighter than Nintendo’s, and cheaper than other mobile solutions. | Image: GuliKit	

After teasing it on X last week, GuliKit announced a new version of its TV Docking Station today that now supports the Switch 2 as well as previous versions of the console, including the original Switch and OLED model. The new version of the dock carries forward a similar design as the original and looks like a tiny streaming box with a magnetic dust cover that flips over to become a support for a docked Switch. It's available starting today through GuliKit retailers including Amazon for $29.99, so it's cheaper than Jsaux's $46 OmniCentro Dock and Genki's $69.99 Covert Dock 3 while adding a bit more functionality.
At 105 grams, GuliKit's TV …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: GuliKit 的新 Switch 2 移动底座让你无论有没有电视都能玩
zh.summary: GuliKit 推出了一款新的电视对接站，支持 Switch 2 和早期 Switch 机型，价格为 $29.99，低于 Jsaux ($46) 和 Genki ($69.99) 等竞争对手。这款 105 克重的底座配有可作为支架的磁性防尘盖，现已通过 Amazon 和其他 GuliKit 零售商销售。

title: Google’s first smart speaker in six years arrives next week
summary: Google's first new smart speaker in six years begins shipping June 29th, with preorders opening today (June 17th) at $99. The Google Home Speaker features a squished round design with touch buttons and status light ring, built for Gemini-powered smart home control and available in four colors.
content:
The Google Home Speaker comes in four colors, including porcelain. (Stroopwafel not included.) | Photo by Jennifer Pattison Tuohy / The Verge	

Google's first new smart speaker in six years starts shipping on June 29th, narrowly missing its promised spring launch window. Preorders for the Google Home Speaker open today, June 17th. 
Nothing has changed hardware-wise in the nine months since the $99 speaker was announced. It has the same slightly squished round design, with touch-capacitive buttons on top and a light ring at the bottom to indicate status. And it still comes in four colors: porcelain (white), hazel (black), jade (green), and berry (red). The last two are US-only.
Google Home Speaker
Google's first smart home speaker in six years, built for Gemini for Home. It has 360- …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谷歌六年来首款智能扬声器下周推出
zh.summary: 谷歌首款新智能扬声器将于 6 月 29 日开始发货，预订于今天（6 月 17 日）开放，价格为 $99。谷歌 Home 扬声器采用压扁的圆形设计，配备触摸按钮和状态灯环，旨在支持 Gemini 驱动的智能家居控制，提供四种颜色。

title: LinkedIn will tell others how you really use Adobe’s apps
summary: LinkedIn launched a new "connected apps" feature allowing users to link supported applications to their profiles with descriptions of how they actually use them. The feature consolidates existing collaborations with tools like Duolingo and Descript into a dedicated section, helping users demonstrate real-world proficiency with job-relevant software.
content:
19 connected apps are available to start, with more “coming soon.” | Image: LinkedIn	

LinkedIn is trying to make it easier for users to prove their proficiency with apps that are relevant to their current or future jobs. A new "connected apps" feature is launching today that allows users to link a selection of supported apps to their LinkedIn profile, with each app providing a "simple, specific description of how you actually use it," according to LinkedIn.
This feature builds on collaborations that LinkedIn introduced in January 2026, which allow users to verify their skills with Duolingo, Descript, Lovable, Relay.app, and Replit. Now, these collaborations will be moved to the new connected apps section on LinkedIn profiles …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: LinkedIn 将告诉他人您如何真正使用 Adobe 的应用
zh.summary: LinkedIn推出了一项新的"关联应用"功能，允许用户将支持的应用程序链接到其个人资料，并描述他们实际使用这些应用的方式。该功能将与 Duolingo 和 Descript 等工具的现有合作整合到专门的部分中，帮助用户展示对工作相关软件的实际熟练程度。

title: Canadian pension giant joins race to fund India’s AI-fueled data center boom
summary: A Canadian pension giant is acquiring an 8.2% stake in CtrlS, joining the investment race in India's AI-driven data center expansion. CtrlS operates over 15 data centers across India, positioning the pension fund to benefit from growing demand for AI infrastructure in the region.
content: The Canadian pension giant will acquire an 8.2% stake in CtrlS, a tech giant that operates more than 15 data centers across India.

zh.title: 加拿大养老金巨头加入为印度AI数据中心热潮提供资金的竞赛
zh.summary: 一家加拿大养老金巨头正在收购CtrlS的8.2%股份，加入印度AI驱动数据中心扩展的投资竞赛。CtrlS在印度各地运营15多个数据中心，使该养老金基金能够受益于该地区对AI基础设施日益增长的需求。

title: DeepL acquires Mixhalo for live-event audio streaming and translation
summary: DeepL acquired Mixhalo, a live-event audio streaming and translation technology company, expanding its real-time translation capabilities. The acquisition includes opening a new San Francisco office to strengthen DeepL's U.S. market presence and position the company for live event and broadcast translation services.
content: With this acquisition, DeepL is opening an office in San Francisco to expand its U.S. business.

zh.title: DeepL收购Mixhalo用于现场活动音频流和翻译
zh.summary: DeepL收购了Mixhalo，一家现场活动音频流和翻译技术公司，扩展了其实时翻译能力。该收购包括开设新的旧金山办公室，以加强DeepL在美国市场的存在，并为该公司提供现场活动和广播翻译服务。

title: Native NACS ports, infotainment upgrade for MY27 Porsche Taycan
summary: The 2027 Porsche Taycan will feature native NACS charging ports and an upgraded infotainment system as standard equipment. A larger battery is now standard, along with new simulated "E-Shifts" for enhanced driving dynamics, improving the Taycan's EV capabilities and user experience.
content: The bigger battery is standard and there are now simulated "E-Shifts."

zh.title: 2027保时捷Taycan配备原生NACS充电口和信息娱乐系统升级
zh.summary: 2027款保时捷Taycan将标配原生NACS充电口和升级的信息娱乐系统。更大容量的电池也成为标配，搭配全新模拟"电子换挡"功能，增强了驾驶动力学表现，提升了Taycan的电动车性能和用户体验。

title: Will Matter finally be able to do what it should have always done?
summary: Matter 1.6 introduces Joint Fabric, allowing multiple smart home ecosystems (Apple Home, Google Home, Alexa, etc.) to share control of the same device network without separate sharing between apps. This addresses a fundamental Matter limitation by enabling truly interoperable smart homes where devices work across all authorized platforms.
content:
Matter 1.6 introduces a new way to share smart home devices with different ecosystems. | Image: CSA	

Matter, the smart home interoperability standard, might finally get a feature that should have been there from day one: a single shared Matter network managed by multiple ecosystems. With this feature, called Joint Fabric, smart devices added to the network will be controllable by any authorized platform -  Apple Home, Google Home, Amazon Alexa, and the rest. No need to "share" your smart light between apps; set it up once, and control it everywhere. It's like your smart home is a joint bank account and your platforms of choice all have signing authority. 
Joint Fabric is part of the new Matter 1.6 spec announced this week at Unify, the Con …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Matter终于能做它一直应该做的事了吗？
zh.summary: Matter 1.6推出Joint Fabric功能，允许多个智能家居生态系统（Apple Home、Google Home、Alexa等）共享对同一设备网络的控制权，而无需在应用之间进行单独的共享。这解决了Matter的一个根本限制，使真正互操作的智能家居成为可能，其中设备可在所有授权平台上工作。

title: Final Fantasy meets Zelda? Yes, please
summary: Square Enix's "The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales" combines classic Zelda-style adventure structure with Final Fantasy-inspired RPG mechanics. The game represents the latest trend of remixing proven gaming formulas, appealing to players seeking both exploration and deep RPG progression.
content:
Let's be real: There's no shortage of Zelda-style games to play right now. That's true even if you've exhausted all there is to see in Tears of the Kingdom or Echoes of Wisdom. Indie developers keep finding new ways to refresh the formula, whether it's fusing it with a Soulslike, making it cozier, or simply shrinking it down into something more manageable. Now we have Square Enix and The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales, a curiously named RPG that mixes the classic Zelda structure with something that resembles Final Fantasy. And it's a combination I can't seem to get enough of.
The Adventures of Elliot is the latest in Square Enix …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 最终幻想遇见塞尔达？好的，我要！
zh.summary: Square Enix的《埃利奥特历险记：千年传说》融合了经典塞尔达式冒险结构和最终幻想启发的RPG机制。这款游戏代表了重新混合成熟游戏公式的最新趋势，吸引了寻求冒险和深度RPG进展的玩家。

title: My backyard made me a color-changing smart lighting convert
summary: The author experienced a change of heart about outdoor color-changing smart lighting, finding it delightful for backyards after initial skepticism. Colorful exterior lighting provides ambiance and enjoyment for summer outdoor spaces, complementing the more subtle tunable white lighting preferred indoors.
content:
I'll admit it. I was wrong. Wildly colorful lighting is delightful for your smart home - well, outdoors, at least. 
Smart lighting is one of my favorite features of the smart home - it combines convenience with ambiance, letting you change the entire look of your room with just a press of a button. But, other than the occasional pop of color, mostly in my kids' rooms and outdoors around the holidays, I've never found much use for color-changing lights. I prefer the subtler effects of tunable white light combined with dimming to set the scene indoors, and that preference also extended to outdoor lighting. Until this summer.
With an influx o …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我的后院让我爱上了可变色智能照明
zh.summary: 作者对户外可变色智能照明的看法发生了转变，在最初的怀疑后发现它对后院来说很令人高兴。彩色户外照明为夏季户外空间提供了氛围和享受，补充了室内偏爱的微妙可调白色照明。

title: Windows and Linux users: The deadline to update Secure Boot keys is near
summary: Windows and Linux users face an upcoming deadline to update Secure Boot keys that protect machine boot sequences. The article explains the importance of these security keys and the implications of their expiration for system security and boot functionality.
content: What you need to know about the expiration of keys securing your machine's boot sequence.

zh.title: Windows和Linux用户注意：更新安全启动密钥的截止日期即将来临
zh.summary: Windows和Linux用户面临即将到来的更新安全启动密钥的截止日期，这些密钥保护计算机的启动序列。该文章解释了这些安全密钥的重要性以及它们过期对系统安全和启动功能的影响。

title: Uber will bring its premium robotaxi service to Houston in 2027
summary: Uber will launch its premium robotaxi service in Houston in 2027 using Lucid EVs equipped with Nuro's self-driving system. This marks the second city to receive Uber's robotaxi service, demonstrating the company's commitment to autonomous vehicle expansion through partnerships with EV and autonomous driving leaders.
content: This will be the second market to have an Uber robotaxi service outfitted with Lucid EVs equipped with a self-driving system from Nuro.

zh.title: 优步将于2027年在休斯顿推出其高端机器人出租车服务
zh.summary: 优步将于2027年在休斯顿推出其高端机器人出租车服务，使用配备Nuro自动驾驶系统的Lucid电动汽车。这标志着休斯顿是获得优步机器人出租车服务的第二个城市，展示了该公司通过与电动汽车和自动驾驶领先企业的合作来扩展自动驾驶车辆的承诺。
